content_of_post_to_comment:
Stop giving other people control over your peace.
You only get one life. Don’t waste it carrying someone else’s negativity or giving away pieces of yourself just to keep them comfortable.
Protect your happiness. Keep your joy. 💯
#TruthOverSpin
comment: Carrying someone else's negativity is real, but I’ve noticed the trap is thinking every uncomfortable interaction means you’re 'losing peace'. Some people will disagree with you or be upset and it’s still healthy. The skill is not absorbing it or reacting instantly, not just avoiding it.
